name: executive-summary
description: Evaluate and improve executive summary slides — 3-5 crisp findings with hierarchy and implication
goal: Achieve consistent 12+/14 with one-message summaries, sharp bullet structure, and decisive prioritization

prompts.text: Build an executive summary slide for a board update with three findings on growth, margin, and capital priorities
Build an executive summary slide on digital transformation with four takeaways on value delivered, risks, and next decisions
Build an executive summary slide for an acquisition case with strategic fit, synergy, risk, and recommendation bullets
Build an executive summary slide on operations performance with three conclusions and one required management action
Build an executive summary slide on a product launch with customer traction, adoption issues, and next-quarter priority actions
Build an executive summary slide for quarterly earnings prep with revenue, EBITDA, and guidance messages
Build an executive summary slide on supply chain risk with top three exposures and mitigation priorities
Build an executive summary slide on talent strategy with attrition, hiring, capability gaps, and recommendation
Build an executive summary slide on cyber posture with resilience gains, remaining gaps, and funding ask
Build an executive summary slide on ESG progress with emissions, supplier coverage, reporting maturity, and next milestone
